feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Princes and Pirates
entry.summary:
Author: SierraStyx

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,411Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 39

Summary: Morgan le Fey is Captain of the most feared pirate ship in all the lands. With her second Merlin at her side, they're unstoppable. That might all be about to change when a chance meeting with Prince Arthur and his knights forces everyone to confront things they never thought they'd have to. Relationships are born, friendships struggle to survive, and hidden truths are revealed as the crew of the Mermaid provides passage for the Prince of Camelot.It's a Merlin Pirate AU

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Drunken Night
entry.summary:
Author: OnceFutureKing

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,281Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 6

Summary: A party is thrown to celebrate the defeat of Morgana. Merlin gets wasted (he is always at the tavern, isn’t he?) and stumbles into his king’s bedchambers with no plan in mind.

entry.title: A Handbook on Yearning
entry.summary:
Author: HazelWitch7

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,080Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: An ongoing Merthur fanfic that will go from Series 1 all the way to Series 5 giving an insight into the thoughts of the characters and extra parts ;) (if you catch my drift). Basically my version of BBC Merlin if the show was made for adults.

entry.title: Eye-fucking across a round table
entry.summary:
Author: TheElizaRoza

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,824Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Eye fucking: to stare at someone with nefariously explicit intent and for them to do it back is a bonus. Arthur Pendragon has a problem. He cannot stop staring at Merlin. At first he blames the fact that his servant is irritating, mysterious, and seemingly incapable of acting like a normal person. Then Morgana discovers Merlin's secret, magic begins slipping through the cracks, and Arthur finds himself uncovering layer after layer of the man standing beside him. Set during Season 2. Arthur learns Merlin has far more secrets than anyone suspected and discovers, to his increasing annoyance, that he doesn't seem to care.

entry.title: can't hide from the family line
entry.summary:
Author: froachy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,016Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 49

Summary: When Arthur finds out about Gwaine and Percival's relationship, he exiles them. Merlin won't accept that his man crush hates gay people. All he wants is a place for people to exist freely - Arthur doesn't believe he can make it. Angst ensues.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,836Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: I hope you like the stars I stole for you
entry.summary:
Author: theplanetsalign

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,169Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Wylan is the absolute boyfailure knight who is hated by his father, and he hates his life until a mysterious man runs through Camelot and he realises why he’s always felt so different from the other knights. Jesper hates the missions Kaz always sends him on, and the fact that he has to use his magic despite its illegality and promised death penalty for Kaz’s mysterious revenge he wants against Jan Van Eck, the king of Camelot. That is, until he runs into a small and uninterested knight who catches his eye.   Essentially Jesper and Wylan but they’re Merlin and Arthur? Also the rest of the gang are there eventually?? I have literally never written anything before so bear with me pls but at least it’s not AI!

entry.title: Leon's No Good Very Bad Day
entry.summary:
Author: SierraStyx

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,101Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 68

Summary: When Arthur doesn't show up to training, Leon realizes that Merlin has gone missing. In the interest of the kingdom not collapsing, he enlists the knights in a scheme to keep Arthur calm while they locate Merlin and bring him home before Arthur can declare war on anyone he thinks may have kidnapped his manservant.He discovers much more than he wanted to along the way.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 149,716Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 143

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: At Destiny's Hand
entry.summary:
Author: theletters

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,666Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Arthur frowned. "Are you trying to get rid of me?" Merlin coughed to hide a laugh; it was surprisingly astute of Arthur to have noticed. "Not at all," Geoffrey said quickly, glowering at Merlin—and then, a gleam came over his eye, and he appraised Merlin with renewed interest. "In fact, this is rather opportune. Merlin, since you have finished your research, you can assist Prince Arthur." After being sent to Camelot under the care of Geoffrey of Monmouth, Merlin spends his first few weeks working in the royal library. It seems like the perfect place to hide away from the tyrannical, magic-hating King Uther—until Prince Arthur comes barging into Merlin's life. Turns out it's not so easy to escape destiny's hand.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: When Magic meets the modern day, chaos ensues
entry.summary:
Author: Music_girl2024

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,633Chapters: 6/22Kudos: 26

Summary: Merlin shouldn’t have turned himself into a tree…1500 years ago it seemed like a smart idea - wait out the years until Arthur’s return as part of nature, without having to interact with anyone. He wasn’t expecting the lake to expand and for his tree to end up in the shallows. Nor was he expecting to be spat out randomly on what he assumed to be an ordinary sunset. Now he’s stuck in the middle of a lake, a recently resurrected Arthur Pendragon in his arms and someone is staring at them.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,523Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 50

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

entry.summary:
Author: hysterical_light

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,605Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 83

entry.title: a thousand hyacinths and a thousand heartbreaks
entry.summary:
Author: camelots-worst-kept-secret (andromaex)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,255Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Could Arthur ever awaken such joy within you? Because Will has always known Merlin deserved something impossible. He just isn’t sure Arthur can be that thing. Prompt: Caution

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the tragedy of a boy who made flowers bloom
entry.summary:
Author: camelots-worst-kept-secret (andromaex)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,084Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Could Arthur ever awaken such joy within you? Because Will has always known Merlin deserved something impossible. He just isn’t sure Arthur can be that thing. Prompt: Caution
